title: Visual Impact
description: Designed and developed a fictional digital design festival. Built a full brand identity, UX/UI system, and responsive website using research-driven design decisions.

title: Scanbox Internal CMS
description: Built a dynamic internal platform for managing film projects and staff. Developed custom data structures and a frontend CRUD system for non-technical users, and implemented token-based access for secure project sharing.

title: Colliderscope Collective
description: Built a full content management system for a music collective, including a custom admin interface for managing artists and content. Implemented CRUD functionality connected to a database, enabling dynamic updates to the public-facing website. Currently still in development.

title: Alpha
description: Dynamic website for a music management company with artists, events, and news powered by Supabase.
